title: BRIDGEWAY HOUSE - 211info
text: BRIDGEWAY HOUSE BRIDGEWAY HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers developmental therapies and supports including in-home occupational and speech therapy, social groups, classes, and tutoring. Also offers parent support groups, parent and child activity groups, parenting classes, and specialized information and referral. 555 E 15th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Families with children living with autism and related disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 345-0805 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 345-0805 Main phone (541) 345-0855 FAX (541) 345-0855 FAX Main phone (541) 345-0805 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies, some scholarships available, Accepts most private insurance and OHP. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Services: Autism Therapy Disability Related Parenting Programs * Autism Spectrum Disorder Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays * Autism Spectrum Disorder Health/Disability Related Social Clubs * Autism Spectrum Disorder Health/Disability Related Support Groups * Autism Spectrum Disorder Parent Support Groups * Autism Spectrum Disorder Specialized Information and Referral * Autism Spectrum Disorder Tutoring Services * Autism Spectrum Disorder If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
